title: Algerian Comforting Rice Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful Algerian-inspired rice pilaf that's perfect for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: Algerian pilaf spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at Middle Eastern markets or online

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced carrots and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the rice and stir to coat with oil and mix with vegetables.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the water is absorbed.
Stir in the chopped Xeriscent herb, Algerian pilaf spice blend, salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and sprinkle with slivered almonds.
